# terrible_community_general_udm_share (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name.
- `ou` (String) Organisational unit, inside the LDAP Base DN.

### Optional

- `directorymode` (String) Permissions for the share's root directory.
- `group` (String) Directory owner group of the share's root directory.
- `host` (String) Host FQDN (server which provides the share), for example `{{ ansible_fqdn }}`. Required if `state=present`.
- `nfsCustomSettings` (String) Option name in exports file.
- `nfs_hosts` (String) Only allow access for this host, IP address or network.
- `owner` (String) Directory owner of the share's root directory.
- `path` (String) Directory on the providing server, for example `/home`. Required if `state=present`.
- `root_squash` (Boolean) Modify user ID for root user (root squashing).
- `sambaBlockSize` (String) Blocking size.
- `sambaBlockingLocks` (Boolean) Blocking locks.
- `sambaBrowseable` (Boolean) Show in Windows network environment.
- `sambaCreateMode` (String) File mode.
- `sambaCscPolicy` (String) Client-side caching policy.
- `sambaCustomSettings` (String) Option name in `smb.conf` and its value.
- `sambaDirectoryMode` (String) Directory mode.
- `sambaDirectorySecurityMode` (String) Directory security mode.
- `sambaDosFilemode` (Boolean) Users with write access may modify permissions.
- `sambaFakeOplocks` (Boolean) Fake oplocks.
- `sambaForceCreateMode` (Boolean) Force file mode.
- `sambaForceDirectoryMode` (Boolean) Force directory mode.
- `sambaForceDirectorySecurityMode` (Boolean) Force directory security mode.
- `sambaForceGroup` (String) Force group.
- `sambaForceSecurityMode` (Boolean) Force security mode.
- `sambaForceUser` (String) Force user.
- `sambaHideFiles` (String) Hide files.
- `sambaHideUnreadable` (Boolean) Hide unreadable files/directories.
- `sambaHostsAllow` (String) Allowed host/network.
- `sambaHostsDeny` (String) Denied host/network.
- `sambaInheritAcls` (Boolean) Inherit ACLs.
- `sambaInheritOwner` (Boolean) Create files/directories with the owner of the parent directory.
- `sambaInheritPermissions` (Boolean) Create files/directories with permissions of the parent directory.
- `sambaInvalidUsers` (String) Invalid users or groups.
- `sambaLevel2Oplocks` (Boolean) Level 2 oplocks.
- `sambaLocking` (Boolean) Locking.
- `sambaMSDFSRoot` (Boolean) MSDFS root.
- `sambaName` (String) Windows name. Required if `state=present`.
- `sambaNtAclSupport` (Boolean) NT ACL support.
- `sambaOplocks` (Boolean) Oplocks.
- `sambaPostexec` (String) Postexec script.
- `sambaPreexec` (String) Preexec script.
- `sambaPublic` (Boolean) Allow anonymous read-only access with a guest user.
- `sambaSecurityMode` (String) Security mode.
- `sambaStrictLocking` (String) Strict locking.
- `sambaVFSObjects` (String) VFS objects.
- `sambaValidUsers` (String) Valid users or groups.
- `sambaWriteList` (String) Restrict write access to these users/groups.
- `sambaWriteable` (Boolean) Samba write access.
- `state` (String) Whether the share is present or not.
- `subtree_checking` (Boolean) Subtree checking.
- `sync` (String) NFS synchronisation.
- `writeable` (Boolean) NFS write access.
